task_description: Implement Phases 31-34 of the Quant Ecosystem roadmap: Federation & Open Protocols, Performance & Cost Engineering, Observability/SRE/Chaos, and Security Hardening + Compliance

verification.summary: All 4 packages pass typecheck, test (407 total: federation 100, performance 71, observability 90, security 146), build, and lint. v1 review found 8 issues, all addressed. v2 review APPROVED with 3 low-severity notes documented.
